sections.instruction: Questions 1-5: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 6-8: Circle THREE letters A-F. Questions 9 and 10: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What types of films does Louise like?
How much does it cost to join the library? {{BLANK}}
When will Louise’s card be ready? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 11-13: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 14 and 15: Circle the correct letter A-C. Questions 16-18: Circle THREE letters A-F. Questions 19 and 20: Circle TWO letters A-E.

questions.content: What took the group by surprise?
options: B the number of possible routes
C the length of the journey

questions.content: How did Charles feel about having to change routes?
options: B He was irritate by the diversion
C It made no difference to him

questions.content: What does Charles say about his friends?
options: A He met them at one stage on the trip
B They kept all their meeting arrangements
C One of them helped arrange the transport
D One of them owned the hotel they stayed in
E Some of them travelled with him
F Only one group lasted 96 days

questions.content: What does Charles say about the donkeys?
options: A He rode them when he was tired
B He named them after places

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 26-30: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What is Jane’s study strategy in lectures? {{BLANK}}
What is Tim’s study strategy for reading? {{BLANK}}
What is the subject of Tim’s first lecture? {{BLANK}}
What is the title of Tim’s first essay? {{BLANK}}
What is the subject of Jane’s first essay? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 31-36: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 36-40: Complete the table below. Write the appropriate letters A-G against question 36-40.
